## Analyzers (2)

### UrlDNA_New_Scan `v0.1.0`
Perform a new scan on urlDNA.io

- **Author:** urlDNA.io (@urldna); Fabien Bloume, StrangeBee
- **License:** MIT
- **Data Types:** `url`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/urlDNA.io/UrlDNA_New_Scan.json)

### UrlDNA_Search `v0.1.0`
Perform a search on urlDNA.io for IPs, domains or URLs

- **Author:** urlDNA.io (@urldna); Fabien Bloume, StrangeBee
- **License:** MIT
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `domain`, `url`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/urlDNA.io/UrlDNA_Search.json)
